CustomObject.label: VS OTP Verification
CustomObject.description: F-001 citizen OTP auth seam (VS-13, EP-06 -- design section 6.4, D-013). Backs VS_OtpService: on issue() one row is written per OTP challenge holding ONLY the mobile, a SHA-256 HASH of the code (NEVER plaintext, D-013), the expiry, an attempt counter, and a verified flag. No password, no clinical data, and NO Aadhaar field ever (REQ-044, rules/10); holds no personal attribute beyond the mobile (design section 2.5). OWD Private (Annexure C5). Retention: transient -- purged DAILY by VS_RetentionPurgeBatch (design section 6.5, class OTP). The POC ships a STUB provider (VS_OtpStubProvider) that issues a fixed documented test code with no live SMS; a real gateway swaps in behind VS_IOtpProvider with zero caller change (A-004). Full rationale: VS-13 review packet.
